activity.title: FLI's President and CEO on Trump's support for an AI 'kill switch'
activity.raw_text: Anthony Aguirre, President and CEO of the Future of Life Institute, issued the following statement in response to President Trump's support of AI safeguards and a 'kill switch': "President Trump is exactly right: advanced AI systems need a robust off-switch to ensure humans never lose control over them. Claude Mythos demonstrated just how vulnerable our economy and our financial system are to the offensive cyber capabilities of the latest AI systems, to say nothing of more capable systems to come."

_verify_phrases: advanced AI systems need a robust off-switch to ensure humans never lose control

enrichment.summary: The Future of Life Institute's President and CEO Anthony Aguirre issued a statement endorsing President Trump's support for AI safeguards, including an AI "kill switch." Aguirre stated that advanced AI systems require a robust off-switch to ensure human control is never lost. He referenced "Claude Mythos" as an example of how vulnerable the economy and financial system are to offensive cyber capabilities of current AI systems.
enrichment.stance_quote: President Trump is exactly right: advanced AI systems need a robust off-switch to ensure humans never lose control over them.

source_entity.name: Future of Life Institute
source_entity.description: Tegmark-led nonprofit. Authored the 2023 "pause giant AI experiments" letter; primary financial backer of safety-pilled policy advocacy in US and EU. Pushes for compute thresholds, licensing, and binding international agreements on frontier AI.
